description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to Java 17 LTS

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 17. Update compiler source and target levels to 17. Update Maven or Gradle toolchain configuration to use Java 17. Migrate any deprecated APIs removed in Java 17. Update dependencies to versions compatible with Java 17. If using Spring Boot, upgrade to a version compatible with Java 17 (e.g., Spring Boot 2.7+ or 3.x). If upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x, migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace. Update any Java EE dependencies to their Jakarta EE equivalents if needed.
